name: Atmospheric Harvester Peltier Core Driver and Energy Combiner Board

circuit_bill_of_materials.name: High-Efficiency N-Channel Power MOSFETs
circuit_bill_of_materials.specification: IRF1404 (40V / 202A), Low On-Resistance (<0.004 Ohm), TO-220 Package
circuit_bill_of_materials.purpose: Executes high-speed pulse-width modulation (PWM) switching to dynamically balance the current entering the Peltier elements to lock the 4.0C dew-point line

circuit_bill_of_materials.name: Ultra-Low Leakage Energy Harvesting Diodes
circuit_bill_of_materials.purpose: Directs the harvested Seebeck latent heat and PVDF acoustic micro-currents into the local storage bus while preventing reverse battery discharge

circuit_bill_of_materials.name: High-Frequency Glass Passivated Bridge Rectifier
circuit_bill_of_materials.purpose: Flips the high-frequency 24.5 kHz acoustic hum vibration pulses from the PVDF layers into clean DC

circuit_bill_of_materials.name: Heavy-Duty Electrolytic Storage Capacitors
circuit_bill_of_materials.purpose: Acts as a local energy storage buffer tank to smooth out power surges generated by rapid ambient thermal shifts on the Seebeck nodes
